Container.Name: CrossWatch
Container.Overview: CrossWatch synchronizes watchlists, ratings, history, and progress across Plex, Jellyfin, Emby, Trakt, SIMKL, AniList, TMDb, MDBList, and more. Link accounts, define sync pairs, and manage everything from the built-in web UI.
Container.Requires: After first start, open the web UI to link media servers and trackers, create profiles, and configure sync pairs. Documentation: https://wiki.crosswatch.app

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Host port mapped to the CrossWatch web UI (container listens on 8787).

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Container timezone for logs and scheduled sync tasks.
